steps.t: Ethring tavern is located in Ringló Vale. You should question a patron of the tavern.
Ethring tavern is located in Ringló Vale. You should question the barkeep.
Ethring tavern is located in Ringló Vale. You should speak with Jajax.
Ethring tavern is located in Ringló Vale. Have a drink with Jajax.
Ethring tavern is located in Ringló Vale. You should question Jajax.
Laerind is located in Ethring village. You should speak with Laerind.
Ethring tavern is located in Ringló Vale. You should question Jajax again.
